description: Biju Patnaik University of Technology (BPUT), Odisha is a public state university that manages academic, examination, and results information for affiliated colleges. Its public website primarily publishes institutional information, notices, and student exam results.
summary: bput.ac.in exposes a public student results web endpoint at results.bput.ac.in; no developer-facing APIs, GraphQL endpoints, MCP servers, CLI tools, or published authentication schemes were found on the domain.
